ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( All_case_creation__c , ISBLANK(All_case_creation_Slack_Channel__c) ), AND( Case_CT_Temperature_update__c , ISBLANK(Case_CT_Temperature_update_Slack_Channel__c) ), AND( Case_escalation__c , ISBLANK(Case_escalation_Slack_Channel__c) ), AND( Case_Priority_Updates__c , ISBLANK(Case_Priority_Updates_Slack_Channel__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide corresponding Slack channel email address to receive notifications
